red_lines: NATO expansion to former Soviet states
Threats to Crimea or annexed territories
Western weapons enabling strikes on Russian territory
core_narratives: Russia as a great power civilization-state

decision_history.event_description: Continued war in Ukraine entering fourth year
decision_history.decision_taken: Maintained offensive operations, expanded military-industrial production, deepened partnerships with China, Iran, and North Korea for materiel
decision_history.outcome: Grinding attritional conflict, significant economic adaptation to sanctions

decision_history.decision_taken: Pivoted energy exports to India and China, expanded BRICS cooperation, developed alternative payment systems
decision_history.outcome: Economic contraction moderated, ruble stabilized through capital controls

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: security services (siloviki), military-industrial complex, state media apparatus

military_posture.force_disposition: wartime footing with strategic nuclear deterrent on alert
